name: Muse Video
description: Muse Video is Meta's in-development video generation model in the Muse family, intended to bring prompt-driven creative video workflows into Meta's AI products.

details.name: availability
details.value: Meta says Muse Video is already in development; no public release surface or external API availability has been announced.

details.name: api_availability
details.value: No public Meta API or AI Stats Gateway route has been announced or configured for Muse Video.
